text_block_list.text: One afternoon, while I'm relaxing in<n>my office...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Trainer. We'd really like<n>to get your
advice on something...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh do say yes! Pretty please! Come<n>on, "yes" on
three! One, two—
choice_data_list: Sure. What do you want advice on?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You see, we're going to be<n>interviewed tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: They plan to have a photo shoot, but...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru told me that if I have my<n>picture taken,
my soul will be sucked<n>out of my body.
Apparently, I need to<n>"avoid it at all costs."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And that's the truth! They get youwith that shutter, and click! Yoursoul's jumping straight out of ya! Allthat's left is a shell!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Though I do think Suzuka'll end up<n>fine, seeing
how fast she is. But I'm<n>afraid they'll catch me
straight away!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I think... that's just a superstition.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Watch it! This is just like baking<n>bread—let your
guard down for one<n>minute and you're toast!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What are you gonna do if we drop our<n>guards and
get our souls vacuumed<n>right out? Just thinking
about it is<n>giving me the heebie-jeebies...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Any ideas, Trainer? How do we deal<n>with those
huge cameras reporters<n>are always lugging
around?!
choice_data_list:
Modern cameras don't take your soul, so you'll
be fine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
...Modern cameras? You mean<n>they're safer than
the older ones?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I give Matikanefukukitaru a brief<n>explanation on
how cameras have<n>evolved.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I see what you're saying... So<n>these cameras
don't work like those<n>evil daguerreotype ones
made with<n>silver and mercury...

You learn something new every day!<n>You're so
smart, Trainer.
Guess there's nothing for me to be<n>scared of.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. So Suzuka, allow me to<n>explain. There is
nothing to fear. You<n>see, the thing about modern
cameras—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Erm... I've been right next to you<n>listening this
whole time...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru sounds like an<n>expert now. It
looks like she came out<n>of this exchange a little
wiser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What a suggestion! You want us to<n>plot a
soul-salvaging tactic to take<n>back what's rightfully
ours?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nnngh! It's a little risky, but it might<n>just work! I'll
snatch back my soul<n>before that camera even
knows it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
If I don't do anything, everyone will<n>end up
soul-sucked, all across the<n>country—sad shells of
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
You're up next, Fukukitaru. Look at<n>the camera
and say cheese!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Nooo, I got snapped!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Time to strike back before they steal<n>my soul!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hum-dilly-dee, come back to me! Soul<n>retrieval
magic!

text_block_list.name: Photographer A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, wh-what was that? Is that<n>some sort of
performance?! It was<n>pretty neat, so shall we get
another<n>shot of it?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's desperately rattling off<n>incantations at the
camera. We should<n>probably channel all that
energy she<n>has somewhere else.
